items.title: 2 Warren Buffett Stocks to Hold Forever
items.author: Adria Cimino
items.description: Warren Buffett's investment strategy focuses on long-term holdings of solid businesses. The article highlights two key stocks: Amazon and American Express, discussing their growth potential, market positioning, and strategic advantages.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong performance in e-commerce and cloud computing, well-positioned in AI market, trading at reasonable valuation, with potential for continued growth
Strong competitive moat, growing revenue, attracting younger consumers, resilient during economic fluctuations, consistent earnings growth

items.title: Is Delta Air Lines Stock a Buy After a Strong Earnings Report?
items.author: Daniel Sparks
items.description: Delta Air Lines reported strong Q2 results with record revenue and double-digit margins, highlighting resilient premium demand and steady loyalty economics despite softness in main cabin seats. The company maintained its full-year earnings guidance and trades at an attractive valuation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong Q2 performance with record revenue, maintained full-year guidance, robust premium demand, and attractive stock valuation at 10-11x expected earnings
Mentioned as a partnership for Delta's loyalty program, no specific performance details provided

items.title: Is American Express a Buy Ahead of Its Platinum Card Refresh?
items.description: A major update to the Platinum card franchise should enhance an already robust bull case for the premium credit card and integrated payments company.
